text:
Author: wen
Date: Wed Sep 19 07:22:39 2012
New Revision: 304482
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/304482

Log:
  - Update to 0.1.3
  
  PR:		171608
  Submitted by:	Zhihao Yuan <lichray@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/chinese/fcitx-chewing/Makefile
  head/chinese/fcitx-chewing/distinfo

Modified: head/chinese/fcitx-chewing/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/chinese/fcitx-chewing/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 07:20:18 2012	(r304481)
+++ head/chinese/fcitx-chewing/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 07:22:39 2012	(r304482)
@@ -6,8 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	fcitx-chewing
-PORTVERSION=	0.1.2
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	0.1.3
 CATEGORIES=	chinese
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_GOOGLE_CODE}
 DIST_SUBDIR=	fcitx
@@ -15,8 +14,8 @@ DIST_SUBDIR=	fcitx
 MAINTAINER=	lichray@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Chewing support for Fcitx
 
-LIB_DEPENDS=	fcitx-config.4:${PORTSDIR}/chinese/fcitx \
-		chewing.3:${PORTSDIR}/chinese/libchewing
+LIB_DEPENDS=	fcitx-config:${PORTSDIR}/chinese/fcitx \
+		chewing:${PORTSDIR}/chinese/libchewing
 
 USE_XZ=		yes
 USE_GETTEXT=	yes
